description: Reasoning and study strategy pack for offline mini AI

entries.question: How do I solve linear equations?
entries.answer: To solve a linear equation: move variable terms to one side, constants to the other side, simplify both sides, then divide by the coefficient of the variable. Always check by substituting your answer.

entries.question: How do I find area of a triangle?
entries.answer: Use Area = 1/2 × base × height. Make sure base and height are in the same unit before multiplying.

entries.question: Why does the moon change shape?
entries.answer: The moon appears to change shape because of lunar phases. As the moon orbits Earth, we see different portions of the sunlit side.

entries.question: What is density?
entries.answer: Density is mass per unit volume. Formula: Density = Mass / Volume. Dense objects have more mass in the same space.

entries.question: How can I remember long answers?
entries.answer: Break long answers into short keywords, make a small outline, revise with spaced repetition, and explain the topic aloud in your own words.

entries.question: How do I prepare one day before exam?
entries.answer: Focus on high-yield topics, revise formulas and definitions, solve 1-2 past papers, avoid new chapters, and sleep at least 6-7 hours.
